welcome.title: Welcome to Claude Code UI
welcome.body: A quick 6-step tour of the main features. You can skip anytime and restart it from Quick Settings.

sidebar.title: Projects sidebar
sidebar.body: Your projects, sessions and folders live here. Drag to reorder, right-click for quick actions.

presets.title: Quick presets
presets.body: Pre-built filters: all, recent, favorites, global agents, open tabs. One click to jump.

tabbar.title: Multi-tab
tabbar.body: Each project/session in its own tab, browser-style. Up to 8 tabs. Ctrl+Tab to cycle.

breadcrumb.title: Breadcrumb
breadcrumb.body: Shows where you are and lets you jump back through the workspace quickly.

composer.title: Chat with the LLM
composer.body: Talk to Claude/Codex/Gemini/Cursor from here. Slash commands, file mentions, image attachments, thinking modes.

shell.title: Embedded shell
shell.body: Per-project terminal. Persists across tab switches, detects numbered CLI prompts.
